markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 543. Arrest & Prosecution of Violators
##### § 543.001 — Arrest Without Warrant Authorized

Any peace officer may arrest without warrant a person found committing a violation of this subtitle.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: Any peace officer may arrest without warrant a person found committing a violation of this subtitle.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
